title: PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER CANBY MEDICAL AND DENTAL CLINIC PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary care services that include care for acute and chronic illnesses, annual exams for children and adults, immunizations, mental health screenings, alcohol and drug assessments, and health education. Reproductive health services include STI/STD testing and treatment, pregnancy testing, and Pap tests. Offers assistance applying for Medicaid (OHP) and private insurance through the Federal Health Exchange. 227 NW 3rd Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday/Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm (503) 416-4547 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 416-4547 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (CareOregon, Trillium, Yamhill, PacificSource Marion/Polk County and Open Card), Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fee available. No insurance $25 down payment for first visit. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. If applying for sliding scale fees, bring one of the following, last 2 pay stubs, previous year's tax return, or unemployment statement. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Marion Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Canby Area Transit (CAT) for the 3X Canby Bus, Route 99X Bus, City Circulator, and Molalla to Canby Bus. Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - GENERAL DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER CANBY MEDICAL AND DENTAL CLINIC
